arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are no strangers to attracting top Portuguese talent to the French capital, and this summer, the Ligue 1 leaders may look to repeat their success. arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Chelsea, PSG, Juventus to challenge Man United for Osimhen
arts.sum: Manchester United face competition for Victor Osimhen, while Barcelona explore a deal to bring Neymar back to Camp Nou. Join us for the latest transfer news, rumours and gossip from around the globe. The 33-year-old only recently joined boyhood club Santos, where he has already scored twice in six league appearances.
